title: Beta Era
description: Recreate the feeling of 1.7.3 version while playing 1.20.1!
body:
![[Logo][(https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1117517733920251914/1188770602052505690/BETA-ERA-25-12-2023.png?ex=659bbbe5&is=658946e5&hm=1d5095fc6afc95378bc1982ca7f64feda1ee9e01c4e18fc5c349ea55d42853f6&)](https://i.imgur.com/v4PJxlc.png)](https://i.imgur.com/TCZsGS9.png)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Relive the old days of Minecraft beta with the latest Minecraft version!


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![Nostalgia Felling](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1170430835984437260/1170431803262247053/248108bfec6f4bd54d53107575c1de87abfd6ec2da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709365200db273d9a080f0768875cf62c00.png?ex=6559048f&is=65468f8f&hm=b8af78933ab62c5768861c301c51e992d0b9f1325a4e479e99b6c112958a7589&)

Beta Era brings the old visuals of Minecraft Beta back to life. Experience the programmer art updated textures, old structures and the iconic feel of the past, all while playing in Minecraft 1.20.1 and kepping some modern features.

‎　

![Beta Gameplay](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1117517733920251914/1188448862604640386/ca734a88984f3aa71921f5aa9f19648844b37f26da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709d1debf802fcfe888c9230b381b418f7c.png?ex=659a9041&is=65881b41&hm=be26d50623c2d5f350d30a4d013567daa86e4adb55c654f7f346a45001435411&)

Revisit the days of simpler gameplay mechanics. Beta Era adjusts the gameplay to match the Beta versions, with limited features, basic mechanics, and a wide open sandbox world.


![Classic Combat](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1170430835984437260/1170432237313986630/83f4962b97235696abc1a4032a5d9fadfb88243ada39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709365200db273d9a080f0768875cf62c00.png?ex=655904f6&is=65468ff6&hm=000a5114df9f9b7f7a10aeeffa384c1360e3fb424d6be5b64ae15105a0fca761&)

Beta Era retains the combat system of Alpha (pre 1.9), making the combat easier, bringing back fights without cooldown and sword blocking (requies shield in offhand).


![Beta Terrain](https://static1.textcraft.net/data1/c/4/c4f615393dd41121924b4027c3e0c156d6aaaef4da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709365200db273d9a080f0768875cf62c00.png)

Explore the beta 1.7.3 crazy terrain generation what all we love.


![Multiplayer Support](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1170430835984437260/1170433546251415582/459e562772850295e24309f708c4ec3b11fd025fda39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709365200db273d9a080f0768875cf62c00.png?ex=6559062f&is=6546912f&hm=6f723b102cf00af8792abc2826592c512bde32efc8d5babb371f4f455b63bfc8&)


Invite your friends to join you on this nostalgic adventure and create your own Alpha-like world. [Here](https://github.com/b3spectacled/modern-beta-fabric/wiki/Using-Modern-Beta-for-Server-Multiplayer) is how to make a world with this generation.



-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Credits:
Beta continuum texture pack (edit by me)
Site: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/beta-continuum/
Vanilla Tweaks:
Site: https://vanillatweaks.net/

If you find any bugs let me know on my discord server!

(Before creating a world change world preset to "Modern Beta" in order to beta 1.7.3 terrain generator work)
